title: Prepared statement methods
excerpt: description: Bind parameters and run D1 prepared statements using the run, all, first, and raw methods. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. This chapter documents the various ways you can run and retrieve the results of a query after you have [prepared your statement](https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/worker-api/d1-database/#prepare). Binds a parameter to the prepared statement.
